feats_traits: Variant Human Traits: Resourceful, Skillful, Versatile
Feat: Fey Touched (Bane & Misty Step 1/long rest)
Sorcerer Origin: Eyes of the Dark
Sorcerer Origin: Strength of the Grave

sessions.Session 2:
Session: Session 2

Date: 13.11.2025

Notes:
Sitting on a desk in the class of Citaly.
Tmrw first expedition is announce: Calderen (newest ruin they found from the dawn forged),
 first ruin they found in the last five years.
Midnight menagerie tonight for students (near the dormitory?)
Tmrw at 6 o'clock sharp-->ready at the docks.
On the party: Madea drinks a nightowl espresso (southern temptation).
Starfall tea: makes you very clear in the head.

Calamity at  Blutquell Cyluviel comes to us and tells us he has news about the catastroph:

Witch fires, trembling of the earth, light, lone figure in black robe, man/ spirit born of the mountain.
Sorcery at places, necromancy-->witness tell of the dead standing up again and fighting against them.

From the Church of Shak'Asat: corpus Grimrock-->the name made whispering voices appear, everything
turned dark around them. Cursed name? A pupil who turned to necromancy. He has broken the
secret oath of the scholars. Decree: all who practice necromancy can legally be hunted down.

The dead rose again and people had to slay people they knew once. Blutquell seems to develop a
hate against everyone studying magic, not only necromancy.

The North is already thinking about becoming their own state. Now with the incident in Blutquell 
South blames the North even more.

Ramir and Madea have a heated discussion about the articles (Madea thinks they have the right to
be scared of magic now, while Ramil condemns the hatred in the articles).

Ramil tries to make amends befor turning to the dormitories but the discussion but they don't find
common ground.

Madea tries to read the journal of her mother in her bed at night:
Can't read the scribblings (foreign language)

Six sections:
1. Runes and weird stuff
2. sketches of dungeon entries
3. Rituals and diagramms
4. Wild scribbles
5. Weird maps
6. Listed names (some of them are crossed out)

Because of the night-owl espresso Madea can't sleep for hours (was awake till 4 in the morning)
In the morning she pays the price.

After 20 hours of traveling on a flying ship, we arrive in the south mountains called Kel Daren.
Citaly tells us he forgot something and boarded the ship and flew away.
We agree that this is probably a test.

We enter the ruin and the door closes behind us. Ivan (assistant of the prof) is there. We explore.
Madea recognizes a rune on a obelisk from the the journal of her mother (a circle with three vertica
and one diagonal line).
Ramil touches a sword of corpses (looking like dawn forged) and the ground breaks away, we fall,
land on a slope. Feel water.
We found ourselve in a room with a standing coffin enwrapped in chains, some of them glowing with
ember. The temperature is ice cold and hot at the same time. We landed in a lake or something and
go into the room.
Madea gets an uneasy burning sensation and feels dizzy.
Where the lake once was is now solid floor.
Ramil and Philiador open the coffin with stones and there is a skeleton inside with a metal globe,
which is extremly magic. Philiador touches the crystal thing (=world fragment) and we all get a 
vision of black clad soldiers, thousands of them, marching, corpses around them as they march. 
Soldier Madea will recognize everywhere...the ones who hunted her mother and her...and killed her.
Once we open our eyes again we found ourselves in a long hallway, with many doors, behind which
we hear our class camerads scream behind those doors. And have the dooming feeling that we have
freed a magic that was asleep for a very long time.
In the hallways different coffins are standing along the wall, imbued with hyroglyphes.
We have such a strong feeling that what just happened needs to stay a secret at all costs.
Philiador gets hit by an arrow (for stepping on a pressure plate) and when he falls down he hits two
more tiles. There also appears a mirror imagine of him.
Madea almost gets hit as well, but only her dress gets a scratch and the poison evaporates.
Philiador almost dies, they get saved by Ivan (the assistant) and their class mates all tell them they
have been missing for three days although for the main group it felt like three hours.
(At the end we get XP for finding a legendary artifact and get to level 4).
We fly back with Rusty Pete.
On her shoulder plate the black clad soldiers had a symbol (red and black) like a red sun. 
We come back to the school,in the school everyone is gathered (students and professor), at first 
we think its for us. But its the High Priest of the Church. To ensure safety and responsibility for the
realm. (looks like a angel)
Madea is happy that at least the church is here to keep an eye on the magic and ensure safety.
Her mother has never mentioned the church in either a good or a bad way. Madea new it excisted,
heard from it, but is pretty neutral against it.
Balar Osiriand and Falar and Talaf have declared independence against the Republic (the North).
The whole North wants to be independent.
All magic that destroys was forbidden. Anfauglith is the only exception (for research).
We are urged to write letters to our closest ones.

characters.Jeany Wright: Her eyes are covered up, has six arms, is our captain for our first excursion.
characters.The High Priest of the Church:
Introduced himself as the faceless.
He kinda looks like a dark angel. And is installed in the university permanently now.

current_character: The High Priest of the Church

places.Kel Daron:
Newest found ruin of the dawn forge (= Kelaria, academic name of the dawn forged)
First excursion of the research class.
Necra= undead, often found in the ruins.
